channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DHS Drops a Semisonic Bombshell on Haitians Hoping for Deportation Grace Period After SCOTUS TPS Decision
700 Rabbis Demand Mamdani Retract AIPAC 'Monsters' Remarks
item.description: More than 700 rabbis from across the United States are demanding New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani apologize after he referred to the American Israel...

item.title: Rep. Jordan to Newsmax: SAVE America Act Is 'Good Common Sense'
item.description: Rep. Jim Jordan, R-Ohio, told Newsmax on Friday that Senate Republicans should find a way to send the SAVE America Act to President Donald Trump's des...

item.title: New York City pours $15M into sex change initiatives as Mamdani accuses federal government of intimidation
item.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani announces $15 million in taxpayer-funded sex change initiatives for children and adults as a defense against federal action.
